title: Crunchy Mexican Borlotti Beans Tacos
description: A kid-friendly Mexican dish featuring borlotti beans and a mother-sauce base, this recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of crunchy taco shells, creamy beans, and fresh toppings makes for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the onion and garlic in a large skillet over medium heat until the onion is translucent.
Add the diced poblano pepper to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the tomato sauce and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the borlotti beans to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Warm the taco shells according to the package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the bean and sauce mixture into the taco shells.
Top each taco with shredded cheese, chopped cilantro, and any other desired toppings.
Serve the tacos immediately and enjoy.
